config.script:
'OBJECT_SORTER #include "50618"
'plobject_noname_text 'pl_skladnik_noname_text #include "50630"
private sub put_podsumowanie(byref pTB,byref pSubKonto,byval curSuma) pTB.newrow.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN pTB.newcell pTB.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(curSuma,pSubKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot,pSubKonto.pJednostka.nDokladnosc-1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell pTB.cell.colspan = 2 end sub
#define RANK_EXPESSION .pSubKonto.strKod + cstr(.idobj) NAVOARRAY_OBJECT_SORTER(csort_pldekret_wg_kont_navoarray,RANK_EXPESSION)
sub plug_naliczenie_dekrety_wg_kont(byref pContainer,byval idNaliczenie)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 1
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) dim pNaliczenie : set pNaliczenie = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLNALICZENIE,idNaliczenie)
if pNaliczenie.listDekret.exists(1) then pTB.section_head.newrow.row.styleitem=STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.newcell.addtext("Kwota") pTB.newcell.addtext("Opis").cell.width = 3000 pTB.newcell.addtext("Tytułem").cell.width = MAXIMIZE_SIZE pTB.section_body pPlugInTable.body.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY
dim pDekret
dim curSuma dim pLastKonto : set pLastKonto = nothing curSuma = ccur(0.0)
'załaduj tablicę dekretami dim pArrOfDek : set pArrOfDek = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() for each pDekret in pNaliczenie.listDekret pArrOfDek.add pDekret next 'posortuj wg kont set pArrOfDek.Operations = new csort_pldekret_wg_kont_navoarray pArrOfDek.Sort
#ifdef _IOW dim curFundPracy: curFundPracy = ccur(0.0) dim curFGSP: curFGSP = ccur(0.0) #endif
dim iter for iter = 0 to pArrOfDek.UpperIndex() set pDekret = pArrOfDek.Value(iter) if not (pDekret.pSubKonto is pLastKonto) then if not pLastKonto is nothing then put_podsumowanie pTB,pLastKonto,curSuma end if set pLastKonto = pDekret.pSubKonto curSuma = ccur(0.0) pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.cell.colspan = 3 pTB.addtext(pLastKonto.strNazwa).element.bold = true end if
#ifdef _IOW if pLastKonto.strNazwa = "Fundusz Pracy" then curFundPracy = pDekret.curKwota end if if pLastKonto.strNazwa = "FGSP" then curFGSP = pDekret.curKwota end if #endif
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell if pDekret.curKwota <> ccur(0.0) then dim curKwota: curKwota = pDekret.curKwota #ifdef _IOW if pLastKonto.strNazwa = "Ub. spol. - firma" then curKwota = curKwota + curFundPracy + curFGSP end if #endif pTB.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity(curKwota,pDekret.pSubKonto.pJednostka.strSkrot,pDekret.pSubKonto.pJednostka.nDokladnosc-1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT curSuma = curSuma + curKwota end if pTB.newcell.addtext(pDekret.strOpis) pTB.newcell if not pDekret.wrefDokument is nothing then pTB.addtexthli pDekret.wrefDokument.text, _ doc_.createhlistr( doc_.afc.convert.formatter(" OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(%1,%2,USAGE_VIEW) ") _ .add(cstr(pDekret.wrefDokument.type)).add(cstr(pDekret.wrefDokument.idobj)).done() ) end if next if not pLastKonto is nothing then put_podsumowanie pTB,pLastKonto,curSuma end if else pTB.newrow.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY pTB.newcell.addtext("brak dekretów") end if end sub
sub plug_naliczenie_nal_storage(byref pPage,byref pContainer,byref pNalStorage,byval idRedirect,byval nDispLevel)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 1
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) dim iter : iter = 1 #ifdef _IOW dim curFundPracy: curFundPracy = ccur(0.0) dim curFGSP: curFGSP = ccur(0.0) #endif
do while true dim pDisplayItem : set pDisplayItem = pNalStorage.get_display_item(iter)
if pDisplayItem is nothing then exit do end if
#ifdef _IOW if pDisplayItem.get_text() = "Fundusz Pracy" then curFundPracy = pDisplayItem.get_computed_value().curvalue end if if pDisplayItem.get_text() = "FGSP" then curFGSP = pDisplayItem.get_computed_value().curvalue end if #endif
if pDisplayItem.get_level() >= nDispLevel then
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.cell.width = MAXIMIZE_SIZE pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY
' ITEM_TYPE_PLAIN_TEXT = 1 - tylko tekst ' ITEM_TYPE_TEXT_CURRENCY_RO = 2 - tekst + liczba (wyswietlanie) ' ITEM_TYPE_TEXT_CURRENCY_EDIT = 3 - tekst + liczba (do edycji) ' ITEM_TYPE_SUBTITLE = 4 - subtitle
' ITEM_TYPE_TEXT_DATE_EDIT = 5 - tekst + data (do edycji) ' ITEM_TYPE_TEXT_YEAR_MONTH_EDIT = 6 - tekst + do edycji (rok + mc)
select case pDisplayItem.get_type() case 1 pTB.cell.colspan = 2 pTB.addtext pDisplayItem.get_text() pTB.element.bold = pDisplayItem.get_bold() case 2 pTB.addtext pDisplayItem.get_text() pTB.element.bold = pDisplayItem.get_bold() pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(pDisplayItem.get_curvalue(), _ pDisplayItem.get_unit(),pDisplayItem.get_precision()) case 3 '<currency> pTB.addtext pDisplayItem.get_text() pTB.element.bold = pDisplayItem.get_bold() pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
#ifdef _IOW if pDisplayItem.get_text() = "Ubezpieczenie spoleczne - firma" then pDisplayItem.get_computed_value().curvalue = pDisplayItem.get_computed_value().curvalue + curFundPracy + curFGSP end if #endif
with pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY,-1).element .size = 12 .border = 0 .unit = pDisplayItem.get_unit() .precision = pDisplayItem.get_precision() .customredirect = clng(idRedirect) .transfer = pPage.createtransfer("custom")
dim pUserPropHLI : set pUserPropHLI = doc_.createhli() pUserPropHLI.prop(100) = 3 set pUserPropHLI.prop(1) = pDisplayItem.get_computed_value() set .userprop = pUserPropHLI end with case 4 pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN pTB.cell.colspan = 2 with pTB.addtext(pDisplayItem.get_text()).element .bold = true .fontsize = 5 end with case 5 '<date> pTB.addtext pDisplayItem.get_text() pTB.element.bold = pDisplayItem.get_bold() pTB.newcell.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT with pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_DATE,-1).element .border = 0 .size=10 .customredirect = clng(idRedirect) .transfer = pPage.createtransfer("custom") set pUserPropHLI = doc_.createhli() pUserPropHLI.prop(100) = 5 set pUserPropHLI.prop(1) = pDisplayItem.get_computed_value() set .userprop = pUserPropHLI end with case 6 '<int> <int> pTB.addtext pDisplayItem.get_text() pTB.element.bold = pDisplayItem.get_bold() with pTB.newcell.cell .align = ALIGN_RIGHT .keepline = true end with with pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_INTEDIT,-1).element .border = 0 .size = 4 .customredirect = clng(idRedirect) .transfer = pPage.createtransfer("custom") set pUserPropHLI = doc_.createhli() pUserPropHLI.prop(100) = 6 set pUserPropHLI.prop(1) = pDisplayItem.get_computed_value() set .userprop = pUserPropHLI end with pTB.addtext "-" with pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_INTEDIT,-1).element .border = 0 .size = 2 .customredirect = clng(idRedirect) .transfer = pPage.createtransfer("custom") set pUserPropHLI = doc_.createhli() pUserPropHLI.prop(100) = 106 set pUserPropHLI.prop(1) = pDisplayItem.get_computed_value() set .userprop = pUserPropHLI end with
end select end if
iter = iter + 1 loop end sub
